strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Current role includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, matching the AI agent requirement
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, founded Fluent-Asserts and Trial test runner)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited explicit cloud platform depth (AWS CDK mentioned, but GCP/Azure/Kubernetes specifics light)
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms era)

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin exposure

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer well above the 6+ year bar, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js/React work and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience that maps cleanly to the role. Gaps around Nest.js, Kotlin, and broader cloud/Kubernetes specifics exist but are reasonable to close given the breadth of languages and platforms shown across the career.
